# 🎨 Palette: [UX improvement]

## 💡 What & Why
Explain the enhancement and the problem it solves.

## 📸 Before/After
Include screenshots if applicable.

## ♿ Accessibility Checklist
- [ ] **Semantic HTML & Keyboard Nav**: Proper tags and keyboard focus support.
- [ ] **Focus States & ARIA**: Visible focus indicators and ARIA labels for icons.
- [ ] **Contrast & Alt Text**: WCAG AA contrast and descriptive alt text for images.

## 🧪 Verification
- [ ] Verified on mobile/responsive views
- [ ] Manual accessibility check performed
